title: Temporal Continuum Unbound
description: A brand new advanced Doctor Who mod made by Dj Studios! (owners of tardisuniverse)
body:
![The Temporal Continuum unbound logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fa40ebed6ddf02c34ed0d21b22d8a1628957f93.png)
# Temporal Continuum Unbound
Embark on a groundbreaking Doctor Who-inspired adventure with Temporal Continuum Unbound, the latest creation by DJ Studios, the team behind TARDIS Universe! This advanced mod redefines time travel gameplay, allowing you to explore alien worlds, pilot your TARDIS, and unravel the mysteries of the universe like never before.

Key Features:

- Fully immersive TARDIS mechanics inspired by the Doctor Who universe. (Coming soon!)

- Richly detailed tech and dimentions and planets to explore! (Coming soon!)

- Dynamic gameplay designed for fans of all things Whoniverse. (Coming soon!)

Join the adventure and take your place in the Temporal Continuum. a universe of endless possibilities awaits!
